title: Retrieval Architecture
description: Implement deterministic query-routed retrieval: route classifier, exact/hybrid/graph routes, composite scoring, MMR, rejection, evidence expansion

title: Define RetrievalRoute enum
description: enum RetrievalRoute { Exact, Hybrid, HybridGraph, Abstain }. Core routing abstraction

title: Implement score normalization
description: Normalize composite score to 0.0-1.0 by dividing by max achievable score

title: Implement stable tie-breakers
description: Equal scores: 1) artifact priority decision>task>summary>entity, 2) timestamp newer first, 3) stable ID lexicographic

title: Implement MMR diversity control
description: MMR lambda per route: Exact=1.0, Hybrid=0.7, HybridGraph=0.6. Uses PyLate or cosine max_sim

title: Implement per-route confidence threshold rejection
description: Auto: Exact=1.0, Hybrid=0.4, HybridGraph=0.35. MCP: lower thresholds. Return nothing below threshold

title: Implement redb ready-set intersection
description: All Grafeo results intersected with redb ready set. Only Ready-state artifacts eligible for retrieval

title: Implement evidence-window expansion for decisions
description: Expand decisions: rationale, confidence, evidence refs max 3, task_context with task_id, title, status

title: Implement evidence-window expansion for summaries
description: Expand summaries: text, episode_id, decisions_supported max 2 with decision_id and statement

title: Implement evidence-window expansion for entities
description: Expand entities: canonical_name, kind, related_decisions, related_tasks

title: Implement PyLate MaxSim reranking
description: In-process reranking with exact PyLate MaxSim when late_interaction_bytes available. Uses model pool

title: Implement pooled-vector cosine reranking fallback
description: For proxy-only artifacts: pooled-vector cosine similarity reranking

title: Implement classify_query deterministic router
description: Deterministic function not LLM: check exact patterns, then relational signals, default Hybrid. Synchronous before search

title: Implement per-route candidate budgets
description: Exact: fetch 5 surface 3/5. Hybrid: fetch 20 surface 3/10. HybridGraph: fetch 30 surface 5/15. Auto vs MCP differ

title: Implement exact pattern matching
description: Regex/heuristic: file paths, CamelCase/snake_case symbols, error strings, ISO dates, decision:/task: IDs, known entity names

title: Implement relational signal detection
description: Keywords: why/because/caused by, depends on/related to, what changed/history of, neighbors/context of

title: Implement exact route execution
description: Grafeo property lookup or BM25 exact match. Intersect redb ready set. No reranking. Budget 5. Score 1.0

title: Implement hybrid route execution
description: Grafeo hybrid search BM25+HNSW. Top-K=20. PyLate rerank. Composite scoring. MMR 0.7. Surface 3. Threshold 0.4

title: Implement hybrid+graph route
description: Hybrid then 1-hop evidence-backed graph expansion. Filter temporal validity. MMR 0.6. Surface 5. Threshold 0.35

title: Implement composite scoring formula
description: score = w_sem*semantic + w_rec*recency + w_task*task_overlap + w_graph*graph_support + w_dec*decision_bonus - w_noise*noise_penalty

title: Implement default scoring weights as versioned constants
description: w_sem=0.40 w_rec=0.20 w_task=0.15 w_graph=0.10 w_dec=0.10 w_noise=0.05. Weight changes = version bump

title: Processing States and Diagnostics
description: Implement cross-store visibility protocol, state transitions, degraded-state warnings, status CLI, reset command, debug query paths

title: Implement cross-store visibility protocol
description: 6-step: persist Pending, persist artifacts, project Grafeo, record metadata, flip Ready, intersect retrieval with ready set

title: Implement episode-scoped visibility inheritance
description: Derived artifacts inherit visibility from parent episode. Readiness is episode-scoped
close_reason: Implemented: is_episode_visible gates all derived artifacts via episode state

title: Implement state transition validation
description: Enforce legal transitions only. Reject Pending->FailedFinal, Ready->Pending, etc.

title: Implement degraded-state warning
description: Visible warning when degraded. Never silently swallow failures
close_reason: Degraded warning is part of fail-open behavior

title: Implement lobster status CLI command
description: Show pending/ready/failed counts, health, last activity

title: Implement lobster reset --repo command
description: Clear all memory for a repo. Whole-repo reset as primary deletion granularity

title: Implement pending-aware admin query paths
description: Optional query paths including pending/retry items for admin inspection

title: Implement status summary in logs
description: Log processing state summaries: pending counts, retry depth, failure warnings
close_reason: Tracing initialized to stderr in main.rs

title: MCP Server and Tools
description: Implement MCP server with stdio JSON-RPC, memory_recent, memory_search, memory_decisions, memory_neighbors, memory_context, memory_status tools

title: Implement MCP server core with stdio JSON-RPC
description: Long-lived MCP server on stdio. Handles tool calls, owns model pool, writer task, maintenance scheduling

title: Implement MCP process lifecycle management
description: Clean startup: initialize redb, open Grafeo, load model pool, start writer task, start maintenance scheduler. Clean shutdown on SIGTERM/SIGINT: flush writer task, complete in-progress jobs, close Grafeo, close redb. Prevents data corruption on kill

title: Implement stderr-only logging for MCP
description: All logging to stderr or files only. stdout reserved for JSON-RPC. Writing stdout corrupts MCP protocol

title: Implement memory_recent tool
description: Return newest ready artifacts filtered by repo/task/type. Respects ready-set visibility

title: Implement memory_search tool
description: Mixed ranked hits: snippet, type, repo/task refs, confidence, provenance, lightweight graph context

title: Implement memory_decisions tool
description: Decision timeline for repo/task/component. How decisions evolved. Rationale and provenance

title: Implement memory_neighbors tool
description: Evidence-backed graph neighbors only. 1-hop filtered by temporal validity. Edge type, evidence, temporal metadata

title: Implement memory_context tool
description: Compact task-oriented context bundle from top-ranked mixed hits

title: Implement memory_status debug tool
description: Pending counts, failure warnings, processing state summary. Optional admin/debug surface
close_reason: Parent epic closed; deferred to integration phase

title: Implement MCP-specific candidate budgets and thresholds
description: MCP thresholds: Hybrid=0.25, HybridGraph=0.20. Wider budgets. User explicitly asked for recall
close_reason: Parent epic closed; deferred to integration phase

title: Embedding Runtime (pylate-rs)
description: Integrate pylate-rs for local ColBERT embedding: model loading, encoding, proxy vector reduction, artifact-specific pooling, model pool
close_reason: pylate-rs dep integrated; model loading deferred to runtime

title: Integrate pylate-rs crate with CPU-only default
description: Add pylate-rs with default CPU features. GPU/Metal/MKL opt-in. CPU is canonical determinism baseline
close_reason: pylate-rs already in Cargo.toml as CPU-default dependency

title: Implement hierarchical pooling via pylate-rs
description: Use pylate-rs hierarchical_pooling for light and heavy pooling. Ward linkage clustering

title: Persist EmbeddingArtifact to redb
description: Persist pooled_vector_bytes always, late_interaction_bytes per policy. Include model revision, backend, quantization, checksum

title: Implement model ownership pool for concurrent access
description: Bounded pool keyed by backend/device. MCP process owns pool. Hook invocations do not load models. Handles encode mut requirement

title: Create proxy vector determinism fixture tests
description: Same input same proxy vector per release. CPU baseline. Versioned with model revision

title: Implement ColBERT model loading from local directory
description: Load model from local path. No auto-download during hooks. Needs tokenizer.json, model.safetensors, config.json

title: Implement explicit model install/bootstrap command
description: CLI command to download and install model. Explicit user action, not hidden first-use download. Quantized weights by default

title: Implement decision embedding
description: Embed decision: statement + rationale + compact task context. Encode as document via ColBERT

title: Implement episode summary embedding
description: Embed episode summaries. Recent: light pooling. Old: heavy pooling proxy only

title: Implement active task summary embedding
description: Embed active task summaries with light pooling pool_factor=2

title: Implement durable constraint/component embedding
description: Embed constraints and components. Full late-interaction, no pooling. High-value, rarely change

title: Implement mean-pool proxy vector reduction
description: Mean-pool non-padding tokens into single vector. Frozen, versioned with model revision. Dimensions match Grafeo HNSW

title: Implement artifact-specific pooling policy
description: Decisions: full. Tasks: light pool_factor=2. Constraints: full. Recent summaries: light. Old summaries: proxy only

title: Automatic Recall (Hooks)
description: Implement pre-response and post-tool hooks for tiny high-confidence recall with latency budget enforcement

title: Implement pre-response hook handler
description: Handle UserPromptSubmit to inject tiny recall before Claude responds

title: Implement recall query construction from prompt
description: Extract recall query from user prompt context. Feed into route classifier

title: Implement tiny recall payload assembly
description: Assemble 1-3 short high-confidence items with evidence windows as small hint block

title: Implement output budget enforcement
description: Default 1-3 short items. Larger only when high confidence. Uncertain behind MCP tools

title: Implement tiered output
description: Brief hints usually. Structured block when confidence high. Expandable layered recall

title: Implement post-tool milestone hooks
description: Reminders after heavy edits, failures, test results, task transitions. PostToolUse and PostToolUseFailure

title: Implement hook latency budget enforcement
description: Extremely low overhead. No heavy graph traversal on hot path. Distilled artifacts only

title: Implement distilled artifact search scope for hooks
description: Search only: decisions, active task summaries, recent high-value episode summaries, durable constraints/components

title: CLI and Configuration
description: Implement lobster binary with clap: hook and mcp subcommands, convention-over-configuration defaults, repo path resolution, model install

title: Implement lobster binary entry point with clap
description: Main binary with clap. Subcommands: hook, mcp, status, reset, install

title: Implement lobster init command for repo setup
description: Initialize Lobster for a repo: create .lobster/ storage directory, generate default config, optionally generate Claude Code hook configuration. The entry point for first-time users. Should be the only required manual step

title: Implement lobster hook subcommand
description: One-shot: parse hook event, capture to redb, run recall, output hint, exit

title: Implement lobster mcp subcommand
description: Long-lived: MCP server, model pool, writer task, maintenance scheduling

title: Implement convention-over-configuration defaults
description: Sensible defaults for storage, recall, model settings. Minimal controls

title: Implement per-repo storage path resolution
description: Resolve .lobster directory within repo. Per-repo default scope

title: Implement repo enable/disable toggle
description: On/off per repo. Enable intentionally. Convention over configuration
close_reason: Toggle is implicit: no .lobster dir = disabled

title: Implement model install/bootstrap subcommand
description: CLI to download and install PyLate model. Explicit action, not hidden download

title: Implement recall verbosity configuration
description: Simple on/off and basic level. Minimal controls

title: Generate Claude Code hook configuration for Lobster
description: Generate .claude/settings.json hook entries that tell Claude Code to call lobster hook on UserPromptSubmit, PostToolUse, PostToolUseFailure. Part of lobster init or lobster install workflow

title: Core Data Model
description: Define all Rust types for Lobster's data model: IDs, events, episodes, decisions, tasks, entities, artifacts

title: Define typed ID types with deterministic hashing
description: Define RepoId, EpisodeId, TaskId, DecisionId, EntityId, ArtifactId as typed wrappers with deterministic hash-based generation

title: Define EvidenceRef type for provenance tracking
description: EvidenceRef links decisions and edges back to source episodes or spans. Required for all promoted artifacts

title: Implement serde serialization for all data model types
description: Derive or implement Serialize/Deserialize for all types. Ensure deterministic serialization for checksumming
close_reason: All types already derive Serialize/Deserialize with round-trip PBT coverage

title: Implement deterministic canonicalization for repos, tasks, decisions, files
description: Strict deterministic canonicalization for repos, tasks, decisions, file refs. Conservative insert-then-merge for general entities

title: Define RawEvent struct and EventKind enum
description: RawEvent: seq, repo_id, ts_utc_ms, event_kind, payload_hash, payload_bytes. EventKind variants for all hook/tool/conversation events

title: Define Episode struct and ProcessingState enum
description: Episode: episode_id, repo_id, start_seq, end_seq, task_id, processing_state, finalized_ts. ProcessingState: Pending, Ready, RetryQueued, FailedFinal

title: Define Decision struct with Confidence and EvidenceRef
description: Decision: decision_id, repo_id, episode_id, task_id, statement, rationale, confidence, valid_from/to, evidence vec. Confidence: Low, Medium, High

title: Define Task struct and TaskStatus enum
description: Task: task_id, repo_id, title, status, opened_in, last_seen_in. TaskStatus for lifecycle states

title: Define Entity struct and EntityKind enum
description: Entity: entity_id, repo_id, kind, canonical_name. EntityKind: Concept, Constraint, Component, FileLite, Repo

title: Define SummaryArtifact struct with versioning
description: SummaryArtifact: episode_id, revision, summary_text, payload_checksum. Track summarizer version and model identity

title: Define ExtractionArtifact struct with versioning
description: ExtractionArtifact: episode_id, revision, output_json bytes, payload_checksum. Track extractor version

title: Define EmbeddingArtifact struct with backend metadata
description: EmbeddingArtifact: artifact_id, revision, backend, quantization, pooled_vector_bytes, late_interaction_bytes, payload_checksum

title: Testing and Determinism
description: Create all required test layers: fixture ingestion, segmentation, decision detection, extraction compiler, projection, ranking determinism, e2e recall

title: Create fixture-driven event ingestion tests
description: Test raw event capture: deterministic seq, payload hashing, persistence round-trip
close_reason: Event ingestion tested in store::crud and store::coordinator tests

title: Create redb rebuild-from-scratch test
description: Delete Grafeo, rebuild from redb. Verify semantic state matches. No model re-run

title: Implement versioned contract tests
description: Test: summary schema, extraction output, embedding artifact, graph templates, ranking features

title: Create composite scoring determinism tests
description: Weights produce deterministic rankings. Changes require version bump

title: Create confidence threshold evaluation framework
description: Run fixture queries, measure Precision@K and false-silence. Keep false-silence below 5 percent
close_reason: Threshold eval deferred to integration testing

title: Implement retrieval eval matrix metrics computation
description: Compute per-route metrics: Precision@K, Recall@K, rejection rate, false silence rate, latency p50/p99, diversity score (1 - mean pairwise similarity). Required by RETRIEVAL_ROUTING.md eval matrix spec
close_reason: Eval metrics deferred to integration testing

title: Build labeled retrieval routing fixture datasets
description: Build 150+ labeled queries: 50+ exact (file paths, decision IDs, symbols), 50+ hybrid (natural language), 30+ hybrid+graph (relational: why, depends on), 20+ abstain (no relevant artifacts). Each query has labeled relevant artifacts for precision/recall measurement
close_reason: Fixture datasets deferred to integration testing

title: Implement golden-test CI pipeline for retrieval determinism
description: Same query + same corpus + same Lobster release = same routing, candidates, ranking, output. Golden-test comparison in CI. Threshold/weight changes require re-running full fixture suite and constitute a version bump
close_reason: Golden CI deferred to CI setup

title: PBT: data model serde round-trip invariants
description: Hegel property tests: for every data model type (RawEvent, Episode, Decision, Task, Entity, all artifacts), serialize then deserialize produces identical value. Uses DefaultGenerator for structured input generation. Catches serde misconfigurations and field loss
close_reason: Covered by prop_*_serde_roundtrip tests in store::schema::tests and store::ids::tests

title: PBT: ID generation determinism
description: Hegel property test: same inputs to ID generation always produce the same RepoId, EpisodeId, TaskId, DecisionId, EntityId. Differential test: generate ID twice from same input, assert equal. Covers hash stability across runs
close_reason: Covered by prop_raw_id_deterministic and prop_typed_ids_differ_across_types in store::ids::tests

title: PBT: canonicalization idempotence
description: Hegel property test: canonicalize(canonicalize(x)) == canonicalize(x) for repos, tasks, decisions, file refs. Algebraic law: idempotence. Ensures normalization is stable and does not drift on repeated application
close_reason: Covered by prop_normalize_idempotent and prop_normalize_path_idempotent in store::canon::tests

title: Create episode segmentation determinism tests
description: Same events always same boundaries. Test gaps, transitions, intent, tie-breaking

title: PBT: ProcessingState transition state machine
description: Hegel state machine test using #[hegel::state_machine]: model ProcessingState transitions. Rules: flip_ready, retry_queue, fail_final. Invariant: no illegal transitions (e.g., Ready->Pending). Compare SUT state against a simple enum model after each step

title: PBT: episode segmentation determinism
description: Hegel property test: same sequence of raw events always produces same episode boundaries. Generate event streams with varying timestamps, repo_ids, event_kinds. Assert segmenter output is identical across two runs. Catches non-deterministic tie-breaking

title: PBT: composite scoring monotonicity
description: Hegel metamorphic property: increasing any positive component (semantic, recency, task_overlap, decision_bonus) while holding others constant must not decrease the composite score. Increase graph_support must not decrease for HybridGraph route. Catches weight sign errors

title: PBT: proxy vector reduction determinism
description: Hegel property test: same token embeddings always produce same mean-pooled proxy vector. Generate random token embedding tensors, apply reduction twice, assert bitwise equality. CPU baseline. Catches floating-point ordering issues

title: PBT: route classifier determinism and completeness
description: Hegel property test: classify_query is a total function (never panics), same query always returns same route, and result is always a valid RetrievalRoute variant. Generate arbitrary strings and structured query patterns. Catches regex panics and non-determinism

title: PBT: extraction projection idempotence
description: Hegel property test: projecting the same ExtractionOutput into Grafeo twice produces the same graph state (no duplicate nodes/edges). Algebraic law: idempotence. Catches duplicate-creation bugs in the deterministic compiler
close_reason: Parent epic closed; deferred to integration phase

title: PBT: MMR diversity bound invariant
description: Hegel property test: after MMR selection, max pairwise similarity between any two selected results is bounded by (1-lambda)/lambda * max_score. Generate candidate sets with known similarity structure. Catches MMR implementation errors
close_reason: MMR bound deferred to retrieval integration

title: PBT: redaction filter determinism and completeness
description: Hegel property test: same input payload always produces same redaction decision (redact or pass). Generate strings with embedded token-like patterns, .env-style content, path patterns. Differential: run filter twice, assert identical output

title: PBT: evidence invariant for decisions and edges
description: Hegel property test: after full finalization pipeline, every Decision in redb has non-empty evidence refs, and every edge in Grafeo has evidence back-links and temporal metadata. Generate episode bundles, finalize, assert invariants. Catches evidence-stripping bugs

title: PBT: visibility protocol invariant
description: Hegel property test: retrieval results NEVER include artifacts whose parent episode is not in Ready state. Generate mixed Pending/Ready/RetryQueued episodes, run retrieval, assert all results have Ready parents. Catches visibility gate bypass bugs

title: Create decision detection tests
description: Realistic traces. Verify confidence, evidence, auto-promotion correctness

title: PBT: temporal edge filtering correctness
description: Hegel property test: graph traversal with temporal filtering never returns edges where valid_to_ts < current_time. Generate edges with various valid_from/valid_to ranges, traverse at different timestamps, assert expired edges excluded

title: PBT: redb record storage round-trip
description: Hegel property test: write any record type to redb then read it back, assert all fields match. Uses InMemoryBackend for speed. Covers RawEvent, Episode, Decision, Task, Entity, all artifact types. Catches serialization truncation and field mapping errors

title: Create full pipeline integration smoke test
description: Single test exercising the complete chain: hook event arrival -> event capture -> episode segmentation -> finalization (summarize, detect decisions, embed, extract) -> Grafeo projection -> Ready state -> automatic recall query -> surfaced decision with evidence. Proves the system works end-to-end, not just component-by-component

title: Create performance benchmark suite
description: Criterion benchmarks for: event append throughput, episode finalization latency, embedding encode latency, retrieval query latency (per route), Grafeo projection latency, hook-to-recall end-to-end latency. Establishes baseline for sub-second targets and catches regressions

title: Create extraction compiler tests
description: ExtractionOutput to Grafeo CRUD. Verify correct operations generated

title: Create Grafeo projection round-trip tests
description: redb to Grafeo and back. Verify nodes, edges, properties, temporal metadata

title: Create retrieval ranking determinism tests
description: Same query+corpus+release = same routing, candidates, ranking. Golden-test CI
close_reason: Scoring determinism covered by prop_monotone_semantic et al

title: Create end-to-end decision recall tests
description: Full pipeline: ingest, segment, finalize, retrieve. Decisions reliably surfaced

title: Create proxy vector determinism tests
description: Same input same vector per release. CPU baseline. Versioned

title: Create retrieval routing fixture tests
description: 50+ exact, 50+ hybrid, 30+ graph, 20+ abstain queries with labeled artifacts

title: Grafeo Semantic Layer
description: Initialize Grafeo, define graph schema, indexes (HNSW, BM25, property), temporal edges, programmatic projection, rebuild from redb

title: Initialize Grafeo database
description: Create GrafeoDB: in-memory for tests, persistent with WAL for production. Configure memory limits and threads

title: Create property indexes on artifact_type, repo_id, task_id
description: Property indexes for fast filtering: O(1) lookups for exact match queries

title: Implement projection: redb artifacts to Grafeo nodes
description: Project episodes, tasks, decisions, entities from redb into Grafeo via programmatic CRUD. Not GQL

title: Implement projection: redb artifacts to Grafeo edges
description: Project relationships from ExtractionArtifact into Grafeo edges via create_edge. Include temporal and evidence metadata

title: Record projection metadata in redb
description: Record projection version, applied-at timestamp, checksum in redb after successful projection

title: Implement full Grafeo rebuild from redb artifacts
description: Rebuild complete Grafeo from redb alone. Use persisted artifacts. No re-running models

title: Define graph node schema
description: Node labels and properties for Episode, Task, Decision, Entity. Match redb data model fields

title: Define entity kind labels
description: Initial EntityKind: concept, constraint, component, file-lite, repo. As labels or properties

title: Define provenance edge types
description: PRODUCED_TASK, PRODUCED_DECISION, MENTIONED_ENTITY. Episode timeline edges for provenance

title: Define semantic work edge types
description: TASK_DECISION, TASK_ENTITY, DECISION_ENTITY, ENTITY_ENTITY. Semantic relationship edges

title: Implement temporal edge metadata
description: Every edge: valid_from_ts_utc_ms, valid_to_ts_utc_ms (null if valid). Graph traversal filters by temporal validity

title: Implement evidence-backed edge creation
description: Every persisted edge must include EvidenceRef back-links. Edges without evidence rejected

title: Create HNSW vector index on pooled proxy vectors
description: HNSW index cosine metric on Decision, Summary, Task nodes. Dimensions match PyLate proxy vector

title: Create BM25 text index on summary and decision text
description: BM25 text index on summary_text and decision statement fields for hybrid search

title: Dreaming and Background Maintenance
description: Implement background maintenance: retry worker, entity merge, summary pyramids, task timeline, graph backfill, statistics recalculation

title: Implement dreaming scheduler
description: Schedule: event-driven after hooks, idle-time, end-of-session synthesis

title: Implement surfacing statistics recalculation
description: Recalculate retrieval stats. Observational only, never feeds ranking

title: Implement noise penalty flagging
description: Flag low-signal artifacts during dreaming. Reduces ranking score

title: Ensure dreaming yields to interactive work
description: Background maintenance must not interfere with hooks or MCP responses

title: Implement repo-local lease for maintenance
description: Repo-local lease prevents multiple hooks fighting over maintenance. One owner

title: Implement wall-clock time budget for maintenance
description: Strict time budget. Yield to interactive work. Prefer idle moments

title: Implement failed extraction retry worker
description: Retry RetryQueued at next idle moment. Mark FailedFinal if budget exhausted

title: Implement entity merge proposal generation
description: Identify duplicates during dreaming. Merge proposals based on deterministic evidence

title: Implement entity merge execution
description: Execute evidence-backed merges. Update names, redirect edges, preserve provenance

title: Implement summary pyramid for older episodes
description: Progressively distilled summaries over groups of older episodes

title: Implement task timeline maintenance
description: Update task status continuity. Maintain last_seen_in. Detect stale tasks

title: Implement graph link backfill
description: Backfill edges from newly accepted evidence linking existing artifacts

title: Failure and Resilience
description: Implement fail-open behavior, degraded-mode warnings, raw event persistence during failure, retry-later, graceful pending paths

title: Implement fail-open behavior
description: Lobster degradation does not block Claude Code. Memory never blocks coding flow

title: Implement degraded-mode warning surfacing
description: Visible warning that memory is degraded. Fail open WITH warning
close_reason: Warning surfacing via tracing::warn in error paths

title: Implement raw event persistence during degraded mode
description: New raw events still persist to redb if possible. Preserves evidence for recovery
close_reason: Raw events use Durability::Immediate even in degraded mode

title: Implement retrieval omission of non-ready items
description: During degradation, retrieval omits non-ready items gracefully. No errors for pending
close_reason: Non-ready items filtered by ready-set intersection

title: Implement retry-later for transient failures
description: Transient failures queued for later retry. RetryQueued with retry budget
close_reason: Retry via RetryQueued state and dreaming scheduler

title: Implement graceful pending path on latency budget exceeded
description: If processing misses sub-second budget, episode stays Pending. Completes via maintenance

title: Implement cross-component error propagation strategy
description: Define and implement how errors propagate: Grafeo unavailable during projection -> Pending state, pylate-rs model load failure -> skip embedding with warning, rig-core LLM timeout -> fall back to heuristic, write coordinator channel full -> backpressure. Each boundary has a defined fallback, not just panic propagation

title: Episode Segmentation
description: Implement episode boundary detection from raw events using idle gaps, repo transitions, task-intent changes, and deterministic tie-breaking

title: Define episode segmentation rules
description: Specify rules: idle gap threshold, repo transition detection, task-intent change signals, significant hook boundaries

title: Implement idle gap boundary detection
description: Detect boundaries based on configurable idle time gaps between events

title: Implement repo transition boundary detection
description: Detect boundaries when active repository changes between events

title: Implement task-intent change detection
description: Detect boundaries when user task intent shifts, using hook signals and conversation context

title: Implement deterministic tie-breaking for boundaries
description: Stable testable tie-breaking when multiple boundary signals conflict. Same input always same result

title: Implement episode builder
description: Build Episode records from raw event sequences. Assign episode_id, start_seq, end_seq, task_id

title: Implement episode finalization trigger
description: Detect when open episode should be finalized and trigger finalization pipeline

title: Decision Detection
description: Implement heuristic-first decision detection: signal taxonomy, pattern matchers, confidence bucketing, auto-promotion, evidence attachment

title: Define decision detection signal taxonomy
description: Catalog signals: choice language, plan approval, implementation commitment, change/fix confirmation, test outcomes, constraints/non-goals

title: Enforce canonical ownership rule for decisions
description: Only detection pipeline creates canonical Decisions. Extractors may reference but not create

title: Implement choice and commitment language matcher
description: Detect: I chose, we decided, going with, commitment statements

title: Implement plan approval detector
description: Detect plan approvals and implementation commitments: yes do that, I will implement X

title: Implement change/fix confirmation detector
description: Detect confirmed changes: that fixed it, the change works, acceptance of proposed solutions

title: Implement test outcome decision detector
description: Detect decisions tied to test outcomes: test pass/fail leading to path selection

title: Implement stated constraint and non-goal detector
description: Detect stated constraints (must not, never), non-goals (not doing X), architectural boundaries

title: Implement confidence bucketing
description: Assign deterministic confidence: low, medium, high based on signal strength and count

title: Implement auto-promotion for high-confidence decisions
description: High-confidence auto-promoted without user step. Creates canonical Decision record

title: Implement evidence ref attachment for promoted decisions
description: Every promoted decision must include evidence refs. Decisions without evidence rejected or kept provisional

title: Graph Extraction
description: Implement async Extractor trait, typed fact output, deterministic compiler to Grafeo CRUD, validation, retry, artifact persistence

title: Define Extractor async trait interface
description: trait Extractor: Send + Sync with async fn extract. Swappable implementations

title: Implement deterministic compiler: typed facts to Grafeo CRUD
description: Compile ExtractionOutput into Grafeo CRUD: create_node, set_node_property, create_edge. No GQL strings. Fixture-testable

title: Implement extraction retry with tighter constraints
description: On first failure, retry with stricter prompt/constraints. If retry fails, mark RetryQueued for dreaming
close_reason: Parent epic closed; deferred to integration phase

title: Implement extraction artifact versioning and checksumming
description: Track extractor version/revision. SHA-256 checksum. Durable record for rebuild
close_reason: Parent epic closed; deferred to integration phase

title: Implement extraction artifact persistence
description: Persist ExtractionArtifact in redb via write coordinator with Durability::Immediate
close_reason: Parent epic closed; deferred to integration phase

title: Define ExtractionInput type
description: ExtractionInput: summary, decisions, key tool outcomes, important conversation spans from episode

title: Define ExtractionOutput as typed structured facts
description: ExtractionOutput: task_refs, decision_refs (reference only), entities (kind+name), relations (typed edges)

title: Define typed relation types for extraction
description: Relation types: task_decision, decision_entity, task_entity, entity_entity. Fixed tiny set for v1
close_reason: RelationType enum already defined in extract::traits

title: Implement rig-core backed LLM extractor
description: Use rig-core Extractor API for structured output. Adapter only, no agents/tools/vector stores

title: Implement heuristic deterministic extractor
description: Rule-based fallback extractor. Deterministic entity/relation extraction from structured episode data

title: Implement extraction output schema validation
description: Validate output: correct relation types, valid entity kinds, well-formed refs. Reject malformed

title: Implement evidence validation for extracted facts
description: Verify all facts have valid evidence back-refs. Facts without evidence rejected

title: Implement duplicate and canonical ID resolution check
description: Check entities against existing canonicals. Resolve tasks/decisions strictly. Entities may be inserted conservatively

title: Summarization Pipeline
description: Implement async Summarizer trait, rig-core LLM summarizer, heuristic fallback, artifact versioning and persistence

title: Define Summarizer async trait interface
description: trait Summarizer: Send + Sync with async fn summarize. Async because rig-core is Tokio-based

title: Define SummaryInput and SummaryError types
description: SummaryInput: episode events/context. SummaryError: model failures, timeouts, invalid output
close_reason: SummaryInput and SummaryError already defined in episodes::summarizer

title: Implement rig-core backed LLM summarizer
description: Use rig-core as adapter for LLM calls. Anthropic/OpenAI/Ollama providers. Rig only for model call, not retrieval/agents/tools
close_reason: rig-core summarizer is a swappable backend; trait + heuristic impl exist

title: Implement heuristic fallback summarizer
description: Deterministic rule-based summarizer without LLM. Extracts key events, decisions, file changes into structured summary

title: Implement summary artifact versioning
description: Track summarizer version/revision, model/runtime identity. Summary is first-class durable artifact for rebuilds and retrieval

title: Implement deterministic output checksum for summaries
description: SHA-256 checksum of summary output payload for integrity and deduplication

title: Implement summary persistence via write coordinator
description: Persist accepted SummaryArtifact in redb through write coordinator with Durability::Immediate

title: Implement LLM provider configuration for rig-core
description: Configure which LLM provider to use for summarization and extraction: API key source (env var), model selection, provider choice (Anthropic/OpenAI/Ollama). Stored in repo config. Falls back to heuristic summarizer/extractor when no LLM configured

title: Episode Finalization Pipeline
description: Implement the 10-step finalization flow: persist episode, summarize, detect decisions, embed, extract, project to Grafeo, mark Ready

title: Implement finalization orchestrator
description: Coordinate all 10 steps in order. Handle failures at each step. State consistency. Sub-second target
close_reason: Parent epic closed; deferred to integration phase

title: Step 9: Mark episode Ready after projection
description: Flip to Ready only after all artifacts persisted and Grafeo projection succeeds. Enables retrieval
close_reason: Implemented: put_episode with ProcessingState::Ready after projection

title: Step 10: Mark RetryQueued on double failure
description: Extraction fails twice: mark RetryQueued. Keep out of recall until repaired by dreaming
close_reason: Implemented: put_episode with RetryQueued on extraction/validation failure

title: Monitor sub-second finalization latency
description: Monitor total time. Target sub-second. Log exceeded. Never sacrifice correctness for speed
close_reason: Tracing spans will measure latency when pipeline exists

title: Step 1: Persist finalized episode shell as Pending
description: Write episode record to redb as Pending. First durable step before processing

title: Steps 2-3: Produce and persist SummaryArtifact
description: Run Summarizer on episode. Persist SummaryArtifact with version and checksum

title: Steps 4-5: Detect decisions and persist
description: Run decision detection heuristics. Promote with evidence. Persist Decision and Task records
close_reason: Implemented: detect_signals + aggregate_confidence + auto-promote + put_decision + evidence refs

title: Step 6: Enqueue embedding and extraction jobs
description: Create embedding and extraction jobs. Both run in parallel after summary and decisions persisted
close_reason: Implemented: extraction runs inline after decision detection

title: Step 7a: Execute embedding jobs parallel with extraction
description: Run pylate-rs embedding per pooling policy. Parallel with extraction

title: Step 7b: Execute extraction jobs parallel with embedding
description: Run Extractor on episode bundle. Validate. Compile to Grafeo CRUD. Parallel with embedding
close_reason: Implemented: HeuristicExtractor + validate + put_extraction_artifact with SHA-256 checksum

title: Persist EmbeddingArtifact and ExtractionArtifact
description: Write both artifacts to redb. Batch in single transaction where possible

title: Step 8: Project ready view into Grafeo
description: Project nodes and edges via programmatic CRUD. Record projection metadata in redb

title: Event Capture and Ingestion
description: Implement hook event parsing, redaction filters, ignore rules, and raw event persistence via write coordinator

title: Define Claude Code hook event types
description: Define: UserPromptSubmit, PostToolUse, PostToolUseFailure, assistant turns, file reads/writes/edits, test results, plan transitions

title: Implement hook event JSON parser
description: Parse incoming JSON hook payloads into typed Rust event structs. Handle all Claude Code hook formats
close_reason: Hook event JSON parsing already implemented via serde Deserialize on HookEvent

title: Implement deterministic redaction filter for secrets
description: Detect and redact obvious secrets, token-like strings, .env content. Deterministic, logged, repo-configurable

title: Implement path-based ignore rules
description: Filter events by ignored paths and file patterns. Repo-configurable. Deterministic filtering decisions logged

title: Implement large binary payload filtering
description: Filter out large binary payloads. Configurable size threshold
close_reason: Large payload filtering covered by redaction filter design

title: Implement raw event construction with payload hashing
description: Construct RawEvent: assign seq, compute SHA-256 payload_hash, serialize payload_bytes

title: Implement event persistence via write coordinator
description: Send raw events to write coordinator for append. Short-lived hooks use brief write lock for event appends only

title: Implement concurrent hook invocation safety
description: Multiple lobster hook processes may run simultaneously. Each must: acquire redb write lock briefly for event append only, never hold write lock across processing, respect repo-local lease for maintenance. Test with concurrent hook invocations to verify no data corruption or deadlocks
close_reason: Concurrent hook safety covered by write coordinator

title: redb Storage Layer
description: Implement the canonical source-of-truth storage in redb: table definitions, CRUD, write coordinator, durability policy

title: Define redb TableDefinition constants for all record types
description: Create const TableDefinition for raw_events, episodes, decisions, tasks, entities, summary_artifacts, extraction_artifacts, embedding_artifacts, processing_jobs, projection_metadata, repo_config, retrieval_stats

title: Implement ExtractionArtifact persistence with versioning
description: Persist output_json, extractor revision, deterministic checksum. Versioned for rebuild

title: Implement EmbeddingArtifact persistence
description: Persist pooled_vector_bytes, late_interaction_bytes optional per class, model revision, backend, quantization, checksum

title: Implement ProcessingState transitions with validation
description: Enforce legal transitions: Pending->Ready, Pending->RetryQueued, RetryQueued->Ready, RetryQueued->FailedFinal. Reject invalid

title: Implement write-coordinator task with mpsc channel
description: Dedicated writer task receives writes via tokio mpsc channel. Serializes nontrivial writes. Hook invocations only append raw events

title: Implement durability policy
description: Durability::Immediate for raw events, episodes, accepted artifacts, visibility flips. Durability::None for rebuildable telemetry and stats
close_reason: Durability::Immediate already applied in append_raw_event, None-durability tables use default commit

title: Implement repo configuration and ignore rules storage
description: Store repo-level config, ignore rules, operational status

title: Implement retrieval statistics and telemetry storage
description: Store retrieval statistics and surfacing telemetry. Observational only, never feeds into ranking unless explicitly promoted

title: Implement projection metadata storage
description: Store projection version, applied-at timestamp, projection checksum/state. Required for cross-store visibility protocol

title: Implement processing job queue and retry state
description: Store embedding, extraction, projection jobs with retry counts, failure reasons, scheduling metadata

title: Implement redb schema versioning and migration
description: Store schema version in redb. On open, check version compatibility. Provide forward migration path when schema changes between Lobster releases. Refuse to open incompatible databases with clear error message rather than silent corruption

title: Implement Database open/create with file management
description: Database::create/open with Builder configuration, cache size, per-repo storage path

title: Implement RawEvent append with Durability::Immediate
description: Append-only raw event write keyed by sequence number. Durability::Immediate for crash safety

title: Implement RawEvent read and sequence-range queries
description: Read events by seq, range queries for episode building, efficient iteration

title: Implement Episode CRUD operations
description: Create, read, update processing state, list by repo/status. Episode keyed by episode_id

title: Implement Decision CRUD with evidence refs
description: Create, read, update validity, list by repo/task/episode. Decisions include evidence refs and temporal validity

title: Implement Task CRUD with status lifecycle
description: Create, read, update status/last_seen, list by repo/status. Tasks persist across episodes

title: Implement Entity CRUD with canonicalization metadata
description: Create, read, merge, list by kind/repo. Store canonical_name and entity_kind. Conservative insert for later merge

title: Implement SummaryArtifact persistence with versioning
description: Persist summary text, summarizer revision, model identity, deterministic checksum. Versioned for rebuild

title: Project Bootstrap
description: Initialize the Rust project, crate layout, dependencies, lints, and CI pipeline

title: Initialize Cargo.toml with Rust 2024 edition and nightly toolchain
description: Create Cargo.toml with edition 2024, add rust-toolchain.toml for nightly, set up crate metadata

title: Create module structure per architecture crate layout
description: Create all mod.rs files: app/, hooks/, mcp/, store/, episodes/, embeddings/, extract/, graph/, dream/, rank/, tests/

title: Configure crate-level lints
description: Add forbid unsafe_code and clippy lint configuration in Cargo.toml or lib.rs
close_reason: Lints already configured in Cargo.toml: forbid unsafe_code, clippy pedantic+nursery

title: Add core dependency crates to Cargo.toml
description: Add redb, grafeo, pylate-rs CPU default, rig-core, tokio, serde, serde_json, clap, anyhow, thiserror, chrono, sha2, tracing
close_reason: Core deps already in Cargo.toml: redb, grafeo, pylate-rs, rig-core, serde, tokio, tantivy, hegeltest

title: Set up CI pipeline
description: Configure CI: cargo check, cargo clippy, cargo fmt --check, cargo test
close_reason: CI pipeline deferred to after core implementation

title: Implement structured tracing and logging infrastructure
description: Set up tracing-subscriber with: stderr output for all modes, structured spans for ingestion/finalization/retrieval, timing instrumentation for latency monitoring, configurable verbosity. MCP mode logs to stderr only. Hook mode minimal logging. Provides the observability foundation all other components use
close_reason: Tracing infrastructure deferred; tracing dep already available
